description: CompositionNavy blue shorts made of 100% polyester, that has a mesh lining made of 100% polyester, with two insert pockets on the sides, drawstring waist with a navy blue drawstring on the inside, embroidered brand logo on the right hem and logo tab on the side of right pocketFittingRegularWash care Gentle machine wash in lukewarm water Do not bleach Tumble dry at low Cool iron Do not dryclean Close all fastenings Wash and iron inside out Wash with similar colours Use detergent for colours Look good and stay comfortable this summer in these navy blue shorts from puma. The embroidered cat logo on the left leg makes this a really cool pair. Team this with a white or black tees and performance shoes for workouts.Model statisticsThe model wears trousers, length of 40"Height-6”, Waist – 32”
